sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; const AuxaAppMockup = ({ userProfile }) => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('home'); const [heartRate, setHeartRate] = useState(75); const [isBluetoothConnected, setIsBluetoothConnected] = useState(false); const [isHeartRateConnected, setIsHeartRateConnected] = useState(false); const [isSmartLightsConnected, setIsSmartLightsConnected] = useState(false); // Simulate heart rate changes React.useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setHeartRate(prev => { // Simulate small random fluctuations const change = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) - 2; return Math.max(60, Math.min(100, prev + change)); }); }, 3000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); const renderProfile = () => (
👤

{userProfile?.name || 'User Name'}

Member since {new Date().getFullYear()}

Date of Birth {userProfile?.dateOfBirth || 'Not provided'}
Diagnosis {userProfile?.diagnosisType === 'professional' ? 'Professional' : 'Self-diagnosed'}
Autism Type {userProfile?.autismType || 'Not specified'}
Light Sensitivity
{userProfile?.lightSensitivity || 3}/5
); const renderHeartRateTracker = () => (

Heart Rate Monitor

{heartRate}
BPM
Calm Stressed

{heartRate < 70 ? 'You appear calm' : heartRate < 85 ? 'You appear slightly stressed' : 'You appear highly stressed'}

); const renderBluetoothSection = () => (

Connected Devices

💡
Philips Hue
{isSmartLightsConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Connect your bridge to control lights'}
❤️
SensoryPulse Monitor
{isHeartRateConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Connect your heart rate monitor'}
Bluetooth
); return (
{/* App Mockup Container */}
{/* Header with Logo */}
Auxa
{/* Navigation Tabs */}
{/* Content based on active tab */} {activeTab === 'home' && ( <> {/* Onboarding Survey Screen */}

Welcome to Auxa

Let's personalize your experience. Tell us about your light sensitivity.

Not sensitive Very sensitive
Warm
Cool
Purple
{/* Home Screen */}

Auxa Home

{/* Current Mood */}

How are you feeling now?

{/* Light Modes */}

Light Modes

{/* Dashboard Screen */}

Dashboard

{/* Current Light Settings */}

Current Light Settings

☀️
Calm Mode Active
Brightness: 30%
Color: Warm
{/* Mood History */}

Your Mood History (Last 7 Days)

Mon
Tue
Wed
Thu
Fri
Sat
Sun
Stressed
Calm
)} {activeTab === 'profile' && renderProfile()} {activeTab === 'heart' && renderHeartRateTracker()} {activeTab === 'devices' && renderBluetoothSection()}
); }; export default AuxaAppMockup;
